---
title: "Settings"
format: html
---

Libraries

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(devtools)
devtools::install_github("p3piit/mlml")
```

Set general parameters for the different models
```{r}
target <- "y"
args_gmert <- list(
    id = "id",
    target = target,
    random_effect =  NULL,
    max_iter_inn = 50,
    max_iter_out = 10,
    tol = 1e-02,
    cp = 0,
    minsplit = 50,
    minbucket = 20,
    maxdepth = 5,
    xval = 10,
    sanity_check = TRUE
)

args_gmerf <- list(
    id = "id",
    target = target,
    random_effect = NULL,
    max_iter_inn = 50,
    max_iter_out = 10,
    tol = 1e-02,
    ntrees = 10,
    mtry = NULL,
    min_node_size = 5,
    max.depth = NULL,
    seed = 1234,
    num.threads = NULL,
    sanity_check = TRUE
)

ctrl <- rpart::rpart.control(
    cp = 0,
    minsplit = 50,
    minbucket = 50,
    maxdepth = 5,
    xval = 10
)

args_rn <- list(
    ntrees = 10,
    mtry = NULL,
    min_node_size = 50,
    max.depth = NULL,
    seed = 1234,
    num.threads = NULL
)

random_effect <- NULL 

threshold_subset <- 5
```

Data processing

```{r}
data <- mlml::gen_sim(n = 5000, n_groups = 380, n_vars = 300)
  

data_model <- data %>%
  mutate(id = user_id,
         car = ifelse(label_track == "car", TRUE, FALSE)) %>%
  select(-event_id,-start_time, -end_time, -label, -label_stop,
  -duration_hours, -durations_secs, -start_day, -end_day,
  -n_labeled_tracks, -user_id, -label_track)
```


Now run the the data with sub_id and split_by_cluster both true and false, the 4 cases


```{r}

sub_id <- TRUE
split_by_cluster <- TRUE

try(source("analysis.R", local = FALSE), silent = TRUE)


sub_id <- TRUE
split_by_cluster <- FALSE

try(source("analysis.R", local = FALSE), silent = TRUE)


sub_id <- FALSE
split_by_cluster <- TRUE

try(source("analysis.R", local = FALSE), silent = TRUE)


sub_id <- FALSE
split_by_cluster <- FALSE

try(source("analysis.R", local = FALSE), silent = TRUE)
```
